--- match_coverage_optional_multipath.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- OPTIONAL MATCH
OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Person)
-- MATCH with Hints and multiple paths with top-level WHERE
MATCH @{join_method=hash_join} (src:Account)-[:Transfers]->(dst:Account), (src)<-[:Owns]-(p:Person)
WHERE p.id > 0
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: 33,
            Match:    42,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  48,
                          Rparen:  57,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 49,
                              NameEnd: 50,
                              Name:    "n",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 50,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 51,
                                  NameEnd: 57,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    119,
            Hint:     &ast.Hint{
              Atmark:  125,
              Rbrace:  148,
              Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                &ast.HintRecord{
                  Key: &ast.Path{
                    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                      &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 127,
                        NameEnd: 138,
                        Name:    "join_method",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  Value: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 139,
                    NameEnd: 148,
                    Name:    "hash_join",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
            Pattern: &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  150,
                          Rparen:  162,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 151,
                              NameEnd: 154,
                              Name:    "src",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 154,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 155,
                                  NameEnd: 162,
                                  Name:    "Account",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  163,
                          EndPos:    178,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 165,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 166,
                                  NameEnd: 175,
                                  Name:    "Transfers",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  178,
                          Rparen:  190,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 179,
                              NameEnd: 182,
                              Name:    "dst",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 182,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 183,
                                  NameEnd: 190,
                                  Name:    "Account",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  193,
                          Rparen:  197,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 194,
                              NameEnd: 197,
                              Name:    "src",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  198,
                          EndPos:    208,
                          Direction: "LEFT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 201,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 202,
                                  NameEnd: 206,
                                  Name:    "Owns",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  208,
                          Rparen:  217,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 209,
                              NameEnd: 210,
                              Name:    "p",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 210,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 211,
                                  NameEnd: 217,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
              Where: &ast.Where{
                Where: 219,
                Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                  Op:   ">",
                  Left: &ast.Path{
                    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                      &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 225,
                        NameEnd: 226,
                        Name:    "p",
                      },
                      &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 227,
                        NameEnd: 229,
                        Name:    "id",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                    ValuePos: 232,
                    ValueEnd: 233,
                    Base:     10,
                    Value:    "0",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 234,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 241,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Person) MATCH @{join_method=hash_join} (src:Account)-[:Transfers]->(dst:Account), (src)<-[:Owns]-(p:Person) WHERE p.id > 0 RETURN *
